nasb.text: And the rest were killed with the sword which came from the mouth of Him who sat on the horse, and all the birds were filled with their flesh.

esv.text: And the rest were slain by the sword that came from the mouth of him who was sitting on the horse, and all the birds were gorged with their flesh.

cnv.text: 其餘的人都被那位騎白馬的口中所吐出來的劍殺了。所有飛鳥都吃飽了他們的肉。

ccb.text: 怪兽的残兵纷纷被白马骑士口中的利剑所杀，飞鸟饱餐了他们的肉。

csbs.text: 其余的人，也都被骑白马那一位口中所发出的剑杀死了。所有的鸟都吃饱了他们的肉。
